title: thelypteris subdentata
intro: Thelypteris subdentata, also known as the sub-dentate lady fern, is a species of fern native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Thelypteris subdentata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation, and protect against cell damage. Thelypteris subdentata can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
